english: I work as a mechatronics engineer.
similarExample: She works as a production engineer.

english: The machine stops when the safety door opens.
pattern: Main clause + when + present simple clause
similarExample: The alarm turns on when the pressure drops.

english: I am working on a new PLC project.
similarExample: We are testing a new control panel.

english: The technicians are testing the production line.
similarExample: The engineers are checking the safety system.

english: We installed the robot last week.
pattern: Subject + past verb + object + past time expression
similarExample: They updated the PLC software yesterday.

english: The system stopped because a sensor failed.
pattern: Past simple clause + because + past simple clause
similarExample: The line stopped because the motor overheated.

english: I have worked with KUKA robots for two years.
pattern: Subject + have/has + past participle + for + duration
similarExample: She has worked in automation for five years.

english: We have completed the commissioning process.
similarExample: They have finished the safety tests.

english: You should check the alarm history first.
similarExample: You should inspect the sensor connections.

english: The operator must wear safety equipment.
similarExample: Technicians must follow the safety procedure.

english: Could you send me the updated project file?
pattern: Could + subject + base verb + indirect object + object?
similarExample: Could you check the latest robot program?
